query:
SELECT s.id,
                   s.title,
                   s.preset_id,
                   s.started_at,
                   s.finished_at,
                   s.created_at,
                   s.updated_at,
                   (
                       SELECT COUNT(*)
                       FROM croquis_record r
                       WHERE r.session_id = s.id
                   ) AS "record_count!: i64",
                   (
                       SELECT r.id
                       FROM croquis_record r
                       WHERE r.session_id = s.id
                       ORDER BY COALESCE(r.step_index, 999999) ASC, r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC
                       LIMIT 1
                   ) AS first_record_id
            FROM session s
            WHERE s.id = ?1
